metadata.title: Goldberg Aria (DnB)
metadata.description: Bach's Goldberg Variations Aria (BWV 988) reimagined as drum and bass with half-time piano melody. The Aria unfolds at ~87 BPM — every note duration doubled, every time position stretched 2× — while the DnB breakbeat, sub bass, and pads play at the full 174 BPM underneath. The two tempi are compatible: chord changes and bar boundaries align, but the melody floats at a recognizable, stately pace above the fast groove. The sarabande's native 3/4 time is preserved. Sub bass replaces the reese for a cleaner, warmer low end that supports the piano rather than competing with it.
